export class UserStatsParser{constructor(){this._stats=void 0;this._stats=this._blank();}flush(){this._stats=this._blank();return true;}parse(wrapper){// ----- numbers -----
this._stats.health=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.maxHealth=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.energy=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.maxEnergy=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.hunger=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.maxHunger=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.aggression=wrapper.readInt();// seconds OR ms (see handler)
this._stats.xp=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.maxXP=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.strength=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.level=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.points=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.stamina=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.hunger_level=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.gathering=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.defense=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.punches_thrown=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.punches_landed=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.damage_inflicted=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.damage_received=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.shifts_worked=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.kills=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.deaths=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.arrests=wrapper.readInt();// ----- flags & gang -----
this._stats.isAggressive=wrapper.readBoolean();this._stats.working=wrapper.readBoolean();this._stats.dead=wrapper.readBoolean();this._stats.gangName=wrapper.readString();// ----- NEW: identity + lock context -----
this._stats.userId=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.username=wrapper.readString();this._stats.figure=wrapper.readString();this._stats.aggressionMs=wrapper.readInt();// server canonical ms (preferred)
this._stats.isSelf=wrapper.readBoolean();this._stats.inSameRoom=wrapper.readBoolean();this._stats.lockedTargetId=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get stats(){return this._stats;}_blank(){return{health:0,maxHealth:100,energy:0,maxEnergy:100,hunger:0,maxHunger:100,aggression:0,xp:0,maxXP:100,strength:0,level:0,points:0,stamina:0,hunger_level:0,gathering:0,defense:0,punches_thrown:0,punches_landed:0,damage_inflicted:0,damage_received:0,shifts_worked:0,kills:0,deaths:0,arrests:0,isAggressive:false,working:false,dead:false,gangName:'',userId:0,username:'',figure:'',aggressionMs:0,isSelf:false,inSameRoom:true,lockedTargetId:0};}}
